Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Continued To Jan-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Continued To Dec-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for Carolyn Scarola (Administrator).

Mr. Taylor stated that Morgan Stanley sold all of the stocks, brought in a listing of all of the Morgan Stanley accounts ending May 31, 2009, a spread sheet analysis on the stocks, stated that there were blank amounts and that he could not determine what happened to the stocks. In addition, he stated that the stocks were sold at a loss, that Morgan Stanley could not help with determining which stocks caused the losses and that all of the Heirs had waived the accountings. The Court stated that Ms. Bolden and Ms. Blair had requested special notice, and that the difficulty is approving the accounting without providing an analysis. The Court Examiner suggested continuing the matter to allow getting waivers from Ms. Bolden and Ms. Blair or for filing of a petition for waiver of accounting. The matter was continued to December 30, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
